nasb.text: And the Lord said, “Name him Lo-ammi, for you are not My people and I am not your God.”

esv.text: And the Lord said, “Call his name Not My People, for you are not my people, and I am not your God.”

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“給他起名叫羅．阿米；因為你們不是我的子民，我也不是你們的　神。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“给他取名叫罗·阿米，因为以色列人不再是我的子民，我也不再是他们的上帝。
